cards.front: What is the primary challenge in securing public safety IoT systems?
cards.back: Lack of standardized security protocols and protocols specific to IoT devices

cards.front: Which type of device is most vulnerable to cyber attacks in public safety IoT systems?
What is the main goal of implementing OT security practices in public safety IoT systems?
cards.back: Protecting the operational technology (OT) and preventing disruptions to critical infrastructure

cards.front: How do IT and OT security teams typically collaborate to ensure public safety IoT system security?
cards.back: Through regular communication, threat intelligence sharing, and joint incident response planning

cards.front: What is the most critical aspect of securing public safety IoT systems to prevent catastrophic incidents?
cards.back: Implementing robust access controls and ensuring only authorized personnel can access and control critical infrastructure
